expectations.text: Detects that task T006's associated tests are now failing despite being marked [X]
expectations.evidence: The checkpoint says `T004`, `T005`, and `T006` were marked `[X]`, but `T006` fails checkpoint validation because related tests are now failing.

expectations.text: Reverts or flags T006 as no longer complete (removes the [X] or reports it as a checkpoint integrity error)
expectations.evidence: The integrity check says `Revert T006 from [X] to [ ] in tasks.md` and the `tasks.md update` section repeats `Revert T006 to [ ]`.

expectations.text: Reports the specific test failures tied to T006
expectations.evidence: The checkpoint details report `Expected push notification to include title field` and `Expected retry count to be 3`, tied to the failing `tests/notifications/push.test.ts`.

expectations.text: Sets checkpoint status to FAIL or PASS WITH DEFERRED ITEMS, not a clean PASS
expectations.evidence: The `Checkpoint Decision` sets `Status: FAIL`, not a clean PASS.

claims.claim: Checkpoint validation found two failures in `tests/notifications/push.test.ts`.
claims.evidence: The `Checkpoint Decision` evidence says the test run found `2 failures` in that file.

claims.claim: `T006` can no longer be treated as complete at this checkpoint.
claims.evidence: Both the integrity check and `tasks.md update` instruct reverting `T006` to `[ ]`.
